nodes.context: Yakuza organization based in Kagoshima, Kyushu, Japan, with about 40 members. Engages in protection racketeering, drug trafficking, and other crimes.
Sub-group of Kozakura-ikka; its first kumicho, Kiei Hiraoka, became the fourth president of Kozakura-ikka.

edges.context: Hiraoka-gumi is a sub-group of Kozakura-ikka; its leader became the fourth president of the parent organization.
